markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between RunPod and fwd.digital for AI-driven content marketing and SEO optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/oycWn2U8zGGngUgqcWJ_RTV_EMSDBsGn?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [RunPod, a cloud GPU provider, seeks to leverage AI for growth hacking and emerging channels, particularly in AI SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/oycWn2U8zGGngUgqcWJ_RTV_EMSDBsGn?tab=summary&timestamp=119.0)
  - [fwd.digital offers a comprehensive content strategy and production service, utilizing AI and human expertise to create high-quality, SEO-optimized content at scale.](https://fathom.video/share/oycWn2U8zGGngUgqcWJ_RTV_EMSDBsGn?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [RunPod is interested in aggressive content production, including both editorial and programmatic approaches, with a potential start date in March.](https://fathom.video/share/oycWn2U8zGGngUgqcWJ_RTV_EMSDBsGn?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
  - [fwd.digital's process involves extensive research, persona development, and a 200-step workflow with human editors, producing over 20 million words monthly.](https://fathom.video/share/oycWn2U8zGGngUgqcWJ_RTV_EMSDBsGn?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)

## Topics

### RunPod's Business and Goals

  - [Cloud GPU provider targeting developers, AI startups, and researchers](https://fathom.video/share/oycWn2U8zGGngUgqcWJ_RTV_EMSDBsGn?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Seeking to integrate AI into workflows and improve SEO rankings](https://fathom.video/share/oycWn2U8zGGngUgqcWJ_RTV_EMSDBsGn?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
  - [Aiming to be recommended by AI platforms (e.g., ChatGPT, Perplexity) as a top cloud GPU provider](https://fathom.video/share/oycWn2U8zGGngUgqcWJ_RTV_EMSDBsGn?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Current website: \~185 blog posts, 39,000 backlinks, with some existing authority](https://fathom.video/share/oycWn2U8zGGngUgqcWJ_RTV_EMSDBsGn?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)

### fwd.digital's Capabilities and Approach

  - [Utilizes AI workloads code engine with 35,000+ processes run](https://fathom.video/share/oycWn2U8zGGngUgqcWJ_RTV_EMSDBsGn?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
  - [Produces 20+ million words monthly across 35 clients (e.g., Webflow, Reddit)](https://fathom.video/share/oycWn2U8zGGngUgqcWJ_RTV_EMSDBsGn?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
  - [Workflow includes 200+ steps with human editors guiding the process](https://fathom.video/share/oycWn2U8zGGngUgqcWJ_RTV_EMSDBsGn?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
  - [Combines AI-driven research (analyzing hundreds of sources) with human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/oycWn2U8zGGngUgqcWJ_RTV_EMSDBsGn?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
  - [Offers both editorial and programmatic content creation (up to 100 pages/year for programmatic)](https://fathom.video/share/oycWn2U8zGGngUgqcWJ_RTV_EMSDBsGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
  - [Team structure: Managing Directors (VP-level), Managers, Co-managers, Editors, Writers, SEO specialists, and Production Assistants](https://fathom.video/share/oycWn2U8zGGngUgqcWJ_RTV_EMSDBsGn?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)

### Content Strategy and Production Process

  - [Begins with extensive research on client's company, products, and target audience](https://fathom.video/share/oycWn2U8zGGngUgqcWJ_RTV_EMSDBsGn?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [Develops detailed persona and "jobs to be done" analyses](https://fathom.video/share/oycWn2U8zGGngUgqcWJ_RTV_EMSDBsGn?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Creates a comprehensive content strategy (Content OS) with potential topics and keywords](https://fathom.video/share/oycWn2U8zGGngUgqcWJ_RTV_EMSDBsGn?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Utilizes AI for content generation, guided by human editors throughout the process](https://fathom.video/share/oycWn2U8zGGngUgqcWJ_RTV_EMSDBsGn?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
  - [Includes content publishing and ongoing updates/refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/oycWn2U8zGGngUgqcWJ_RTV_EMSDBsGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

### Collaboration Details

  - [fwd.digital can start working with RunPod from March 17th (tentative)](https://fathom.video/share/oycWn2U8zGGngUgqcWJ_RTV_EMSDBsGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)
  - [Pricing: Approximately "10 cents a word" for the entire team and process](https://fathom.video/share/oycWn2U8zGGngUgqcWJ_RTV_EMSDBsGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [Communication via Slack, with weekly meetings and regular updates](https://fathom.video/share/oycWn2U8zGGngUgqcWJ_RTV_EMSDBsGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)
  - [Full-service approach, including content creation, SEO optimization, and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/oycWn2U8zGGngUgqcWJ_RTV_EMSDBsGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)

## Next Steps

  - [fwd.digital to send RunPod an SLW (Statement of Work) for review](https://fathom.video/share/oycWn2U8zGGngUgqcWJ_RTV_EMSDBsGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1253.0)
  - [Share meeting recording and additional information via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/oycWn2U8zGGngUgqcWJ_RTV_EMSDBsGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1253.0)
  - [Tentatively pencil in March 17th as the potential start date (subject to change)](https://fathom.video/share/oycWn2U8zGGngUgqcWJ_RTV_EMSDBsGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)
  - [RunPod to review materials and prepare any additional questions](https://fathom.video/share/oycWn2U8zGGngUgqcWJ_RTV_EMSDBsGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
  - [Potential follow-up call if needed to address any concerns or queries](https://fathom.video/share/oycWn2U8zGGngUgqcWJ_RTV_EMSDBsGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
